productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Light Winter Black Tops
description: CompositionBlack sleeveless blouson top made of 100% polyester with a textured finish, has a V-neck with a mandarin collar covering the back of the neck, pleats emerging from an asymmetric panel on the chest and an elasticated hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadecool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryPerfect on style and great in comfort, this black blouson top from united colors of benetton makes for a great casual wear. The pleats emerging from the asymmetric panel on the upper bust gives this top a luxe feel, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and black heels and ooze style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in blouson topsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
